/usr/bin/ar qc libPHY_NR_COMMON.a CMakeFiles/PHY_NR_COMMON.dir/openair1/PHY/CODING/nr_segmentation.c.o CMakeFiles/PHY_NR_COMMON.dir/openair1/PHY/NR_TRANSPORT/nr_tbs_tools.c.o CMakeFiles/PHY_NR_COMMON.dir/openair1/PHY/NR_TRANSPORT/nr_prach_common.c.o CMakeFiles/PHY_NR_COMMON.dir/openair1/PHY/nr_phy_common/src/nr_phy_common_csirs.c.o CMakeFiles/PHY_NR_COMMON.dir/openair1/PHY/NR_TRANSPORT/nr_scrambling.c.o CMakeFiles/PHY_NR_COMMON.dir/openair1/PHY/NR_REFSIG/scrambling_luts.c.o CMakeFiles/PHY_NR_COMMON.dir/openair1/PHY/NR_REFSIG/refsig.c.o CMakeFiles/PHY_NR_COMMON.dir/openair1/PHY/NR_UE_TRANSPORT/srs_modulation_nr.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libPHY_NR_COMMON.a
